name: Deviled Crab
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw frozen crabmeat or drain canned crabmeat; pick over.
2. Cook onion in butter until soft, then blend in flour.
3. Gradually add milk and cook until thick, stirring constantly.
4. Stir in lemon juice and seasonings.
5. Mix a little of the hot sauce into the beaten egg; add to remaining sauce, stirring constantly.
6. Add parsley and crabmeat; blend well.
7. Divide among six well-greased individual shells or 5-ounce custard cups.
8. Combine melted butter and crumbs; sprinkle over mixture in each shell.
9. Bake in a 350°F oven for 20 to 25 minutes, or until tops are brown.
